sourceSummary.oneLine: Bill of materials for RED-GL1 covering detector, power box, accessory, packaging, and panel module assemblies.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DHF BOM evidence for configured assemblies, parts, drawings, suppliers, quantities, and material specifications.
keyPoints: RED-GL1 includes an OQC Module Ass'y and POWER BOX Ass'y.
1717 PANEL MODULE includes 1717 TFT Panel_with Gods, Read Out IC, Gate IC, and Adhesive.
The BOM lists drawing numbers, revision numbers, supplier names, supply types, units, quantities, and remarks.

evidence.claim: The source document is a Rev.1 BOM for RED-GL1.
RED-GL1 is listed as the top-level item.
The detector section includes an OQC Module Ass'y.
The BOM includes BODY FRAME Ass'y and BODY FRAME SUB Ass'y under the OQC Module Ass'y.
